name: crystal-grotto
summary: A chamber where stone has given way to crystal — prismatic growths climb the walls, a still pool mirrors the glow, every surface refracts light.

primary_palette.note: a central colossal crystal, source of the chamber's power
freestanding scrying crystal on a natural pedestal
still pool amplifying harmonic crystal song
wild growth with no obvious intelligence behind it

story_prompts: the crystals sing a note that pierces the soul — long exposure warps the mind
a crystal dragon has claimed this as a nursery
miners tried to harvest — the chamber remembers every blow
a petrified adventurer stands mid-stride, slowly becoming crystal themselves

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: soft luminous (0.35-0.45) with prismatic color bleed

anti_patterns: no torches or braziers — crystals provide the entire light budget
don't over-pack the center — the colossal crystal needs breathing room
formations cluster against walls and ceiling, not randomly in the middle of the floor
